#1 BENSON/PADILLA: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY J SACRAMENTO. ATTY R HURLBURT APP FOR DEFT J STERMAN, WHO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFT ATTY STATES DEFT SURRENDERED POSSESSION, BUT PLTF DISPUTES IT. COURT DENIES DEFT ORAL MOT TO REMOVE CASE FROM TRIAL CALENDAR.
